final:
module counter(
    input clk,
    input rst,
    output reg [3:0] count
);
    always @(posedge clk or posedge rst) begin
        if (rst) begin
            count <= 4'b0000;
        end else begin
            count <= count + 1;
        end
    end
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
    end
  end

endmodule
